General.Name: Count Ltd
General.Description: Count Limited provides accounting, business advisory, and financial planning services in Australia. It operates through Equity Partnerships, Wealth, and Services segments. The Equity Partnerships segment offers accounting, audit and assurance, taxation, financial planning, and business and corporate advisory services. The Wealth segment provides financial services and investment products provided by Australian Financial Services license holders. The Service segment offers services that support the accounting and financial planning firms. It provides training, finance and lending, digital and IT systems, sector expertise, and support services. The company was formerly known as CountPlus Limited and changed its name to Count Limited in May 2023. Count Limited was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.
